use_cases: Secure message submission in developer-focused applications and dashboards
Terminal-style messaging interface for secure communication gateways
Anonymous or authenticated message input with loading feedback
Technical message forms in SaaS platforms requiring secure input
ai_summary: A secure message gateway form component featuring a terminal-inspired design with dashed borders, corner decorations using PlusIcons, and a diagonal fade grid background. Includes a text input with Send icon button and handles form submission with a 2-second pending state for visual feedback. Designed for developer tools and SaaS applications requiring secure message input interfaces.
